ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the form */,
  "form_description" TEXT /* Description of the form */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the form was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the form was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the patient group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "variable_description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variable was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variable was last updated */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_data" (
  "form_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient group */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Number of patients in the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_data_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES patient_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_data_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_data_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, healthcare provider) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "form_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_form_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_data_id") REFERENCES form_data ("form_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
